auto.name: Auto
auto.prompt_fragment: film texture automatically selected based on camera system, lens character, lighting conditions, and intent, preserving realistic photographic material response

digital_clean_no_emulation.name: Digital clean
digital_clean_no_emulation.prompt_fragment: pure digital capture, no film emulation, no visible grain, smooth tonal gradients, maximum clarity, modern sensor response

kodak_vision3_50d.name: Kodak Vision3 50D
kodak_vision3_50d.prompt_fragment: very fine grain cinema negative texture, extremely clean shadows, smooth highlight rolloff, high color fidelity, minimal noise, daylight-balanced film feel

kodak_vision3_250d.name: Kodak Vision3 250D
kodak_vision3_250d.prompt_fragment: moderate fine grain cinema negative, organic texture presence, strong highlight latitude, rich midtones, balanced contrast, daylight film character

kodak_vision3_500t.name: Kodak Vision3 500T
kodak_vision3_500t.prompt_fragment: visible but refined grain structure, strong highlight retention, cinematic night-friendly texture, organic noise pattern, tungsten-balanced feel

kodak_portra_160.name: Kodak Portra 160
kodak_portra_160.prompt_fragment: very fine photographic grain, soft contrast, excellent skin tone neutrality, pastel highlight response, clean and elegant fashion texture

kodak_portra_400.name: Kodak Portra 400
kodak_portra_400.prompt_fragment: fine but noticeable grain, gentle contrast curve, natural skin rendering, slightly muted colors, classic editorial fashion look

kodak_portra_800.name: Kodak Portra 800
kodak_portra_800.prompt_fragment: visible grain with controlled structure, soft highlight rolloff, organic noise, low-light friendly editorial texture

kodak_gold_200.name: Kodak Gold 200
kodak_gold_200.prompt_fragment: pronounced grain, warm color bias, higher contrast, nostalgic consumer film texture, lively highlights

kodak_tri_x_400.name: Kodak Tri X 400
kodak_tri_x_400.prompt_fragment: strong monochrome grain, high contrast, deep blacks, gritty silver halide texture, classic reportage film character

ilford_hp5_400.name: Ilford HP5 400
ilford_hp5_400.prompt_fragment: coarse but organic black and white grain, softer contrast than Tri X, rich midtones, documentary film texture

fujifilm_provia_100f.name: Fujifilm Provia 100F
fujifilm_provia_100f.prompt_fragment: extremely fine grain slide film texture, crisp contrast, clean highlights, precise color separation, polished editorial feel

fujifilm_velvia_50.name: Fujifilm Velvia 50
fujifilm_velvia_50.prompt_fragment: very fine grain with strong saturation, high contrast slide film look, deep colors, dramatic tonal separation

cinema_print_stock_2383.name: Cinema print stock
cinema_print_stock_2383.prompt_fragment: print film texture, compressed highlights, deeper blacks, denser contrast, subtle grain added by print stage, cinematic finishing look

scanned_negative_film.name: Scanned negative film
scanned_negative_film.prompt_fragment: film negative scanned look, subtle scanner softness, organic grain structure, slight halation, non-digital surface feel

aged_film_stock.name: Aged film stock
aged_film_stock.prompt_fragment: aged emulsion texture, lifted blacks, reduced contrast, uneven grain, subtle fading, archival photographic character

push_processed_film.name: Push processed film
push_processed_film.prompt_fragment: push-processed film texture, increased grain, elevated contrast, compressed highlights, aggressive photographic energy

soft_halation_emulsion.name: Soft halation emulsion
soft_halation_emulsion.prompt_fragment: gentle halation around highlights, organic glow, subtle light bloom without loss of structure

strong_halation_emulsion.name: Strong halation emulsion
strong_halation_emulsion.prompt_fragment: pronounced halation, glowing highlight edges, visible light spill, expressive analog bloom

scanned_magazine_print.name: Scanned magazine print
scanned_magazine_print.prompt_fragment: editorial magazine scan texture, subtle halftone pattern, ink response simulation, tactile printed surface

fine_art_matte_print.name: Fine art matte print
fine_art_matte_print.prompt_fragment: matte paper texture, reduced specular highlights, soft contrast, refined fine art photographic finish
